quotes:
three approved brand colors in hierarchy order are: (1) 
#00529B Deep Blue (dominant), (2) 
#FAA31B Amber Orange (secondary accent), (3) 
#FFC60A Golden Yellow (tertiary accent)

The three approved brand colors in hierarchy order are: (1) 
#00529B Deep Blue (dominant), (2) 
#FAA31B Amber Orange (secondary accent), (3) 
#FFC60A Golden Yellow (tertiary accent).

rules.intent: Maintain established brand color presence and hierarchy across banner executions.
rules.rule_text: The brand colors must adhere strictly to the specified hierarchy order: (1) Dominant: Deep Blue (color.primary.brand_blue = #00529B), (2) Secondary Accent: Amber Orange (color.primary.sunshine = #FAA31B), and (3) Tertiary Accent: Golden Yellow (color.primary.gold = #FFC60A).

quotes: Agenda, is the primary headline font

Agenda, is the primary headline font
and should be used for all headlines and headers.

rules.intent: Preserve brand typography standards in major text hierarchy elements.
rules.rule_text: Agenda (font.family.agenda) must be used as the primary headline font for all headlines and headers.

quotes:
Nunito Sans should be used for
all body copy in print

Nunito Sans should be used for
all body copy in print.

rules.intent: Maintain body copy legibility in print assets.
rules.rule_text: Nunito Sans (font.family.nunito_sans) should be used for all body copy in print applications.

quotes: use this shape and treatment for CTAs:

rules.intent: Ensure consistent interactive element treatments in digital banners.
rules.rule_text: CTAs in banners must apply the asymmetric pill shape and linear yellow-to-orange gradient defined in the official SVG markup.
